title: [IOS] Location sharing dialogue - Don't Allow is selected
scenario: Verify that after denying location permission on first launch, the Find My Device menu option shows a permission prompt with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options, and this behavior persists after app restart.
steps: Launch the app for the first time.
When the location sharing dialogue appears, select "Don't Allow".
Observe the permission prompt that appears.
expected: The permission prompt should display "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options both before and after restarting the app.
